summary: Made two surgical seam edits: the opening no longer relies on the same time-forward scaffold as the adjacent chapter opening, and the closing no longer repeats chapter 11's extra-chime handoff while preserving Ember's mandated post-failure message and Noor's emotional nadir.
edits: Reordered the opening's first three sentences so the chapter enters through Noor's physical contact with the rail before naming the time stamp.
Removed the second Ember follow-up ping at the end and kept the close on Noor, her blood, and the unanswered input field.
